_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial working memory in neurofibromatosis 1: Altered neural activity and functional connectivity.

_contextSnippet: NF1 patients showed greater connectivity between the left parietal seed and multiple cortical and subcortical regions (at z = 2.3)
details: Successfully detected differential functional connectivity patterns between NF1 patients and controls at cluster thresholds of z=2.3 and z=3.1
